---
title: Installation
sidebar: get-started
---

## Requirements

Ammonyte requires Python ≥ 3.10.

## Dependencies

Ammonyte depends on the following Python packages, which are installed automatically with `pip install ammonyte`:

- `pyleoclim >= 1.2.1`
- `scipy >= 1.15.3`
- `numpy >= 1.26.4`
- `PyRQA >= 8.1.0`
- `scikit-learn >= 1.7.0`
- `ruptures >= 1.1.10`

## Install from PyPI

```bash
pip install ammonyte
```

## Install from source

```bash
git clone https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte.git
cd Ammonyte
pip install -e .
```

## Conda environment (recommended)

A pre-configured environment file is provided in `.binder/environment.yml`:

```bash
conda env create -f .binder/environment.yml
conda activate ammonyte_env
```

## Verify the installation

```python
import ammonyte
```

## Running the tests

To run the test suite locally, install `pytest` first:

```bash
pip install pytest
```

Then from the root of the repository:

```bash
pytest ammonyte/tests/
```
